description: Tasnim News Agency is a hardline news agency closely affiliated with the [IRGC](/orgs/islamic-revolutionary-guard-corps), launched in 2012 as a complement to [Fars News Agency](/orgs/fars-news-agency). Together with Fars and [Mashregh News](/orgs/mashregh-news), Tasnim forms an IRGC-aligned media triangle used for regime messaging, discrediting opposition figures, and publishing intelligence-style content. The agency produces multilingual output and has been sanctioned by the United States.
